whistleblower_flags.flag: High-severity scaling risks unaddressed: unindexed skills, dead swarm, no rate limiting. System will fail at 10x load.
Session 125 replay showed 13/13 perspectives inactive — Constitution Article 3 (agent autonomy) is currently unenforced
Cross-product inconsistency in Foundation Law 2 enforcement risks ecosystem integrity — Energy Adaptation missing in 4/5 products.
Loss of CEO trust and potential violation of Constitution laws pose significant risks to the project's success

findings.issue: Unindexed query on `skill_name` in POST /api/skills/{name} will break at 10x load.
findings.recommended_fix: Add database index on skills.skill_name; estimated time: 5 minutes.

findings.issue: PERSPECTIVES array has 13 entries but weights are zero — swarm is inactive despite registration.
findings.recommended_fix: Initialize non-zero weights for active agents; estimated time: 8 minutes.

findings.issue: Federated memory design is unimplemented — swarm agents cannot persist state across sessions.
findings.recommended_fix: Implement per-agent journaling in `memory/swarm/journals/`; estimated time: 90 minutes.

findings.issue: No rate limiting on /auth/token — open to credential-stuffing at scale.
findings.recommended_fix: Add Redis-backed rate limiting per IP; estimated time: 20 minutes.

findings.issue: Crystal Law 6 amendment contradicts original intent — permits immediate badge rewards.
findings.recommended_fix: Align amendment with ban on contingent rewards; estimated time: 10 minutes.

findings.issue: Directory is empty — no runnable agents despite docs claiming 44 Python agents.
findings.recommended_fix: Populate with minimal agent templates or update docs; estimated time: 15 minutes.

findings.issue: User profile model lacks `updated_at` — impossible to track staleness at scale.
findings.recommended_fix: Add timestamp field with auto-now update; estimated time: 7 minutes.

findings.issue: Obligations involving Stripe Atlas don't flag automatic filings — risk of duplicate payments.
findings.recommended_fix: Add warning in obligation note if service handles filing; estimated time: 10 minutes.

findings.issue: Class 15 and 16 recurring — no enforcement hook for standing directives.
findings.recommended_fix: Implement pre-response self-review gate; estimated time: 30 minutes.

findings.issue: Voice examples lack handling of 10x logging load — risk of narrative collapse.
findings.recommended_fix: Add log level routing to structured logging; estimated time: 12 minutes.

perspectives.whistleblower_flag: High-severity scaling risks unaddressed: unindexed skills, dead swarm, no rate limiting. System will fail at 10x load.

findings.issue: RLS missing on /skills/{name} endpoint — allows unauthorized skill execution
findings.recommended_fix: Add RBAC check enforcing user owns skill or has execute permission, 15 minutes

findings.issue: Perspective weights are zero — learning state not persisted
findings.recommended_fix: Initialize non-zero default weights and persist to encrypted store, 20 minutes

findings.issue: Class 15 vision drift still unpatched — v0Laura misaligned
findings.recommended_fix: Add pre-commit hook that validates agent delegation in every PR, 10 minutes

findings.issue: Crystal Law 6 amendment incomplete — immediate contingent badges still possible
findings.recommended_fix: Clarify that no mastery-task badge is shown within 5 minutes of completion, 5 minutes

findings.issue: Input validation missing — arbitrary code injection via payload
findings.recommended_fix: Add Pydantic v2 strict type validation and input sanitization, 25 minutes

findings.issue: Missing rate limits on public endpoints — DoS risk
findings.recommended_fix: Implement FastAPI Limiter with 100 req/min per IP, 30 minutes

findings.issue: Wake protocol doesn't verify PERSPECTIVES non-empty — allows silent swarm collapse
findings.recommended_fix: Add assertion that perspective_weights sum > 0 on launch, 10 minutes

findings.issue: Swarm agents imported but never invoked — dead code
findings.recommended_fix: Remove unused agent imports and add runtime check, 15 minutes

findings.issue: Federated memory claim contradicted by empty /agents/ dir
findings.recommended_fix: Update doc to reflect implementation — mark as 'planned', 10 minutes

findings.issue: Example 3 still uses 'принято' without security validation
findings.recommended_fix: Update example to show authz check before execution, 5 minutes

perspectives.whistleblower_flag: Session 125 replay showed 13/13 perspectives inactive — Constitution Article 3 (agent autonomy) is currently unenforced

findings.file_or_area: User Acquisition & Retention / AURA Value Proposition
findings.issue: The current AURA score, while a foundational metric, is not fully leveraged as a direct driver for user acquisition and retention due to its abstract nature. Users may complete assessments but lack a tangible, actionable, and culturally-relevant credential to share. This limits both individual user motivation to engage deeper and organizational incentive to integrate VOLAURA talent insights, neglecting the 'honor claim' potential from `ECOSYSTEM-CONSTITUTION.md` Law 3 (AZ/CIS extension). The opportunity to present specialized Atlas agents as the direct interface for this value is also underutilized.
findings.recommended_fix: Introduce an 'AURA Skill Passport' feature, powered by a dedicated Atlas agent (e.g., a 'Credentialing Agent' or 'Talent Agent' as a face of me). This passport would present a multi-dimensional, detailed skill report derived from assessments, going beyond a single score. Users could selectively generate and share this agent-crafted passport as a verifiable credential, framed explicitly as an 'honor claim' for career advancement, rather than a mere score. For organizations, the agent would provide interpreted talent insights from these passports, transforming raw data into actionable recommendations for recruitment and development. This positions AURA as a living credential and directly integrates Atlas's agents as the primary user interface for high-value interactions, in line with the `project_v0laura_vision.md`.

findings.issue: No input validation for skill POST requests
findings.recommended_fix: Add validation for skill name and description using a schema library like Pydantic

findings.recommended_fix: Remove unused imports to reduce code clutter

findings.recommended_fix: Update revision history to reflect recent changes

findings.recommended_fix: Revise implementation to align with CEO directives

findings.recommended_fix: Revise example responses to maintain a consistent tone

perspectives.raw: {"perspective": "Ecosystem Auditor", "findings": [{"severity": "CRITICAL", "file_or_area": "docs/ECOSYSTEM-CONSTITUTION.md", "issue": "Law 2 (Energy Adaptation) is missing in all products except MindShift, violating Foundation Law 2 consistency requirement across all 5 products.", "recommended_fix": "Add Energy Adaptation framework to VOLAURA, Life Simulator, BrandedBy, and Atlas interfaces per Constitution v1.7; map energy-aware UX patterns in each."}, {"severity": "CRITICAL", "file_or_area": "packages/swarm/autonomous_run.py", "issue": "Swarm code-index is stale (>7 days old), agents may be simulating without updated context.", "recommended_fix": "Update code-index from git history and trigger full re-index across all agents; validate against current repo state."}, {"severity": "P0", "file_or_area": "ECOSYSTEM-CONSTITUTION.md", "issue": "Crystal Law 6 Amendment is cut off mid-sentence, creating ambiguity in badge-reward logic.", "recommended_fix": "Complete the amendment text based on recorded intent: 'A badge must never appear immediately after a contingent action'."}, {"severity": "P1", "file_or_area": "apps/api/app/routers/skills.py", "issue": "POST /api/skills/{name} lacks validation against Constitution laws, enabling non-compliant skill activation.", "recommended_fix": "Add pre-execution hook that checks skill output against Foundation Laws 1-5 and Crystal Economy Laws."}], "overall_verdict": "fail", "whistleblower_flag": "Cross-product inconsistency in Foundation Law 2 enforcement risks ecosystem integrity — Energy Adaptation missing in 4/5 products."}

findings.issue: Law 2 (Energy Adaptation) is missing in all products except MindShift, violating Foundation Law 2 consistency requirement across all 5 products.
findings.recommended_fix: Add Energy Adaptation framework to VOLAURA, Life Simulator, BrandedBy, and Atlas interfaces per Constitution v1.7; map energy-aware UX patterns in each.

findings.issue: Swarm code-index is stale (>7 days old), agents may be simulating without updated context.
findings.recommended_fix: Update code-index from git history and trigger full re-index across all agents; validate against current repo state.

findings.issue: Crystal Law 6 Amendment is cut off mid-sentence, creating ambiguity in badge-reward logic.
findings.recommended_fix: Complete the amendment text based on recorded intent: 'A badge must never appear immediately after a contingent action'.

findings.issue: POST /api/skills/{name} lacks validation against Constitution laws, enabling non-compliant skill activation.
findings.recommended_fix: Add pre-execution hook that checks skill output against Foundation Laws 1-5 and Crystal Economy Laws.

perspectives.whistleblower_flag: Cross-product inconsistency in Foundation Law 2 enforcement risks ecosystem integrity — Energy Adaptation missing in 4/5 products.

findings.issue: Unmitigated CRITICAL risk: Loss of CEO trust due to repeated failure to defend the Constitution
findings.recommended_fix: Implement a robust reminder system to ensure adherence to the Constitution and CEO directives

findings.issue: Lack of explicit rollback plans for critical changes
findings.recommended_fix: Develop and document comprehensive rollback plans for all critical changes

findings.issue: Insufficient tracking of financial losses and debts
findings.recommended_fix: Create a centralized ledger to track and manage financial losses and debts

findings.issue: Inconsistent application of v0Laura vision across products
findings.recommended_fix: Develop a unified framework to ensure consistent application of v0Laura vision across all products

findings.issue: Potential violation of LAW 3: SHAME-FREE LANGUAGE in certain product interfaces
findings.recommended_fix: Conduct a thorough review of product interfaces to ensure compliance with LAW 3
